text: White House says it will provide answers on 11 deaths and disappearances tied to US space and nuclear research. Eleven. That's not a coincidence, that's a pattern — and the public deserves more than a vague vow.
article_title: White House Vows Answers After 11 Deaths and Disappearances Linked to Space and Nuclear Research - The New York Sun

text: Red state anti-immigrant bills are dying — not from Democratic pushback, but from business lobbies telling GOP legislators the math doesn't work without migrant labor. Farms, meatpackers, and builders win when the culture war meets the payroll.
article_title: In red states, anti-immigrant bills are failing as businesses push back - The Washington Post

text: Trump's Iran diplomacy pitch: sign a deal or "the whole country is going to get blown up." Subtle. The art of the ultimatum, straight from the podium to Tehran's inbox.
article_title: Trump tells Iran to sign deal with US or ‘the whole country is going to get blown up’ - The Independent

text: Trump says Iran violated the two-week ceasefire by firing on ships in the Strait of Hormuz — including a French vessel and a UK freighter — and announces Monday talks in Islamabad. Ceasefire holding by press release only.
article_title: Trump accuses Iran of violating ceasefire, announces Monday talks in Islamabad

text: The Ukraine war isn't just tanks and sanctions, it's a psychological fight. Morale, narrative, and will to endure decide wars as much as artillery shells. Whoever forgets that loses.
article_title: Winning the war in Ukraine is about more than just numbers

text: Big Tech just added $4T back and dragged the S&P 500 to fresh highs. Same seven stocks, same playbook — rally keeps running until it doesn't, Iran risk or not.
article_title: Big Tech’s $4 Trillion Boomerang Powers S&P 500 to New Heights

text: $IONQ earnings on deck May 6. Insider sale hitting the tape but it's a preplanned 10b5-1, not a panic exit. Quantum names trade on narrative — print needs to back up the hype.
article_title: IonQ (IONQ) Sets May 6 Earnings Date as Insider Sale Follows Preplanned Path - TipRanks

text: Strait of Hormuz transits have ground to a halt after Saturday's brief surge, with ships taking fire and Iran warning against crossings. ~20% of global oil flows through that chokepoint. Watch crude, tankers, and defense names on the open. $USO $BNO $XLE
article_title: Hormuz Shipping Traffic Grinds to a Halt as Tensions Deepen

text: Blue Origin just reused and recovered a New Glenn booster for the first time. Bezos finally has the one trick SpaceX built a moat on. Launch cadence is the whole game now — watch what this does to pricing pressure on $RKLB and the broader launch market.
article_title: Blue Origin Launches With First Reused Booster

text: 94 S&P 500 companies report this week with $TSLA headlining. Setup matters more than the print — whisper numbers, delivery guide, and margin trajectory will move it more than the EPS beat/miss itself.
article_title: Tesla Leads A Busy Earnings Week With 94 S&P 500 Reports - Forbes

text: Report: Trump is running Iran policy on impulse, with aides repeatedly blindsided by contradictory decisions they only learn about after the fact. Wars don't tend to reward vibes-based command structures.
article_title: Trump managing Iran war based on conflicting caprices that blindside his aides — report - The Times of Israel

text: A federal judge has halted construction on Trump's White House ballroom project. The people's house isn't a personal renovation fund.
article_title: Judge halts construction on Trump's White House ballroom - NBC News

text: Joe Rogan calls MAGA "dorks" one week, shows up at the White House the next. The podcast bro pipeline to court jester was faster than anyone predicted.
article_title: Joe Rogan criticised for White House appearance weeks after calling MAGA ‘dorks’ - Indy100

text: Virginia Dems pushing a mid-decade gerrymander under Spanberger. Funny how "democracy" talk evaporates the moment the map can be redrawn in your favor.
article_title: Virginia could lose influence in Congress if Spanberger’s gerrymander passes - Washington Examiner

text: Trump signs a psychedelic research executive order with Joe Rogan standing next to him in the White House. The timeline is undefeated.
article_title: Trump Signs Psychedelic Research Order With Joe Rogan at White House - kmjnow.com

text: Big Tech's $4 trillion boomerang is back — mega caps powering the S&P 500 to fresh record highs. Breadth who? The index is once again a leveraged bet on seven names.
article_title: Big Tech’s $4 Trillion Boomerang Powers S&P 500 to New Heights - Bloomberg.com

text: Hormuz at a standstill. Iran reversed course, fired on vessels, and says it'll keep the strait shut while the US blockades its ports. ~20% of global oil flows through there. $CL_F $USO $XOM tankers $FRO $STNG — peace deal hopes fading fast.
article_title: Hormuz at Standstill, Denting US-Iran Peace Deal Hopes

text: Cramer trimming as the S&P 500 flashes overbought. Meanwhile $100 parked in the index in 2000 — through dot-com, '08, COVID — still crushed most market timers. The tape looks hot, but selling every overbought signal for 25 years was the real losing trade.
article_title: Jim Cramer is selling stocks as the S&P 500 flashes overbought — but a $100 bet from 2000 tells a different story - Yahoo Finance UK

text: $PLTR reports earnings May 5. Stock's already priced for perfection after its run — any miss on guidance and the move cuts both ways. Bulls need AIP growth to justify the multiple.
article_title: Prediction: Palantir's Stock Will Make a Huge Move on May 5 - Yahoo Finance

text: Cramer trimming as the S&P 500 Oscillator pushes past +8% into "extremely overbought" territory. Readings that hot have historically preceded pullbacks. Not a sell signal on its own, but a decent reminder to check your position sizing.
article_title: Jim Cramer trims stocks as S&P 500 Oscillator tops 8% in 'extremely overbought' territory — here's what history says - moneywise.com

text: Appeals court greenlights Trump's $400M White House ballroom construction. Demolition and building resume while the lawsuit plays out. A presidential vanity project moving faster than most federal permitting.
article_title: Appeals Court Allows Trump to Resume Construction of $400 Million White House Ballroom - Democracy Now!

text: Trump's "National Garden of American Heroes" won't be ready for the July 4 unveiling he promised. Another deadline quietly slipping past.
article_title: Trump’s sculpture garden of American heroes is unlikely to be ready for July 4 - The Independent

text: National Guard still patrolling DC at $1 million a day with no end date. That's $365M/year to have troops wander the capital. Who's auditing this, and what's the actual mission?
article_title: National Guard roams Washington with no end in sight to $1 million-per-day deployment - The Independent

text: White House mental illness executive order reportedly lines up with $GHRS Phase 3 timeline for 2026. Psychedelic therapy policy tailwind meeting a clinical catalyst is a setup worth watching.
article_title: White House mental illness order aligns with GH Research's 2026 Phase 3 plan - Stock Titan

text:
Trump on his own Energy Secretary Chris Wright saying gas won't hit $3 until next year: "No, I think he's wrong on that. Totally wrong."

When the president is publicly overruling his own cabinet on price forecasts, somebody's getting the blame when pumps don't cooperate.
article_title: Trump says energy secretary 'totally wrong' on gas prices not dropping to $3 until next year

text: Saylor just dropped $2.54B on Bitcoin in a single week — $MSTR's biggest buy since November 2024. Either he's seeing something the rest of the tape isn't, or the conviction trade is now a religion.
article_title: Strategy Buys $2.54 Billion of Bitcoin, Most Since Late 2024

text: Eni and Repsol cut a deal with Caracas to start exporting Venezuelan gas by end of 2031. Six-year runway, massive offshore field, and a sanctions regime that could flip three times before first cargo. $E $REPYY betting long on political weather.
article_title: Eni, Repsol Reach Deal to Start Exporting Venezuelan Gas in 2031

text: Brazil economists hiking Selic forecasts for 2026 and 2027 as the Iran war oil spike bleeds into LatAm's biggest economy. Higher-for-longer is going global — EM central banks don't get to pivot when crude is running.
article_title: Brazil Economists Lift Selic 2026, 2027 Forecasts on Oil Spike

text: Half of the S&P 500's earnings revisions since the Iran war kicked off come from ONE company. That's not a rally, that's a single-stock index with 499 passengers.
article_title: One company is responsible for half of S&P 500 earnings revisions since Iran war’s start

text: Psychedelic stocks ripping up to 40% after Trump signs an executive order to fast-track LSD and other psychedelics through the FDA pipeline for mental health treatment. Regulatory tailwind the sector has been waiting years for.
article_title: Psychedelic stocks jump as high as 40% after Trump supports using drugs like LSD for mental health
